case_title: SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC., VS. SHANNON CURFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CURFMAN, SHANNON SHANNON MARIE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
CERTIFICATE OF COUNSEL TO DEFTS SHANNON CURFMAN AND SHANNON MARIE, INC. IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY CONFESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, - MAILED AS A COURTESY. AS TO DEFENDANT CURFMAN, SHANNON SHANNON MARIE, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1134 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURFMAN, SHANNON SHANNON MARIE, INC. $35,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STATEMENT OF DEFTS SHANNON CURFMAN AND SHANNON MARIE,INC. IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY CONFESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNATURES NETWORK,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURFMAN, SHANNON SHANNON MARIE, INC. $35,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,000.00, THIS IS A CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
